title: lantana urticifolia subsp. portoricensis
intro: Lantana urticifolia subsp. portoricensis, also known as Puerto Rican buttonweed or common buttonweed, is a subspecies of the buttonweed plant that is native to the island of Puerto Rico. The medicinal properties of Lantana urticifolia subsp. portoricensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. This plant has been used to treat health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its health benefits. The herbal preparations of Lantana urticifolia subsp. portoricensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
